_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_azure.azure_advisor_recommendations with category='Cost'. Mirrors the oap-azure-mcp src/server.py azure_advisor_recommendations function (lines 7770-7867): returns a native python dict with success/subscription_id/count/filters/summary/recommendations/executed_as. The mcp-proxy passes this through 3 layers (proxy.result -> jsonrpc -> jsonrpc.result) so the engine unwrap yields the dict verbatim with no FastMCP content[] wrapping. recommendations[] each carry id (full Azure resource path), category, impact (High/Medium/Low), impacted_field, impacted_value (the resource name), last_updated, short_description (problem string), solution, metadata, and extended_properties — the latter holds annualSavingsAmount + savingsCurrency for Cost recs (per Azure Advisor REST API documentation).

recommendations.short_description: Right-size or shutdown underutilized virtual machines
recommendations.solution: We have analyzed the usage patterns of vm-app-prod-01 over the past 7 days and recommend either resizing to Standard_D2s_v4 or shutting it down to save costs.

recommendations.short_description: Optimize the DTU service tier for SQL Database db-prod-core
recommendations.solution: We have analyzed the past usage of db-prod-core. Based on consistent utilization below 30% of provisioned DTU, scale down from S6 to S3 to save approximately $1,440 annually.

recommendations.short_description: Use cool access tier for blobs in stdataprodwus
recommendations.solution: Blobs in this storage account are accessed less than once per 30 days on average. Moving them to the Cool access tier will save roughly $720 per year.

recommendations.short_description: Delete or attach unattached managed disks
recommendations.solution: Disk disk-orphan-dev-001 has been unattached for 47 days. Delete or reattach it to stop incurring storage charges (~$240/year).
